WHAT_IF_RELICS_WHAT_IF_ENTRY.title: What If Only...
WHAT_IF_RELICS_WHAT_IF_ENTRY.description: Choose a relic that changes the rules of the run.
WHAT_IF_RELICS_WHAT_IF_SKIP.title: Skip
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_SERIES_RELI: What If Only Seven Sin Pigs
All replaced relics become random [gold]Seven Sin Pig series relics[/gold].
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_QUESTION_MA:
All rooms on the map become unknown rooms.
Except for Ancient, Rest Site, and Boss rooms.
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_STRIKE.desc: All replaced cards change as follows: the first becomes [gold]Hellraiser[/gold], and the rest become random [gold]Strike[/gold] cards.
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_DIRECT_FLIG: When obtained, enables travel mode, allowing you to freely select any room on the map.
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_OLD_COIN.fl: Money isn't everything, but having none gets you nowhere.
Amid countless stars, only this one.
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_HISTORY_COU: Study the past, and you'll know the rise and fall.
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_ALL_CARDS_A: What If Every Card Is Iron Wave
Whenever you play a card, gain {Block} [gold]Block[/gold] and deal {Damage} damage to a random enemy.
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_I_AM_SNAKEB: At the start of your turn, apply {PoisonPower:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold] to a random enemy.
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_ANGRY.title: What If Angry
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_ANGRY.descr: At the end of your turn, add 1 [gold]Anger[/gold] to your discard pile.
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_ONLY_RARE.t: What If I Could Only Get Rare Cards
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_ONLY_RARE.d: All replaced cards become random [gold]Rare[/gold] cards.
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_ONLY_UNCOMM: What If I Could Only Get Uncommon Cards
All replaced cards become random [gold]Uncommon[/gold] cards.
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_ONLY_COMMON: What If I Could Only Get Common Cards
All replaced cards become random [gold]Common[/gold] cards.
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_ONLY_ATTACK: What If I Could Only Get Attack Cards
All replaced cards become random [gold]Attack[/gold] cards.
The best defense is a good offense.
What If I Could Only Get Skill Cards
All replaced cards become random [gold]Skill[/gold] cards.
What If I Could Only Get Power Cards
All replaced cards become random [gold]Power[/gold] cards.
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_ONLY_COLORL: What If I Could Only Get Colorless Cards
All replaced cards become random [gold]Colorless[/gold] cards.
When obtained, reduce your HP to [blue]10%[/blue] of max HP and add a [gold]Underdog's Triumph[/gold] to your deck.
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_TEN_YEAR_BA: What If Only Ten Year Bamboo
All replaced relics become [gold]Ten Year Bamboo[/gold].
Get ten Ten Year Bamboos and ascend straight to godhood.
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_ANCIENT_CAR: All replaced cards become random [gold]Ancient[/gold] cards.
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_MONSTER_ELI: What If All Monsters Become Elites
Turn all normal enemy rooms into Elite rooms.
We're here to fight the elites!
What If I Had Every Relic
When obtained, directly gain every in-game relic you do not already own, excluding relics that take effect immediately on pickup or interfere with rewards.
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_ALL_FORMS.t: What If I Had All Forms
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_ALL_FORMS.d: When obtained, add all Form cards to your [gold]deck[/gold].
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_ALL_FORMS.f:
If I had all forms,
If I had all form.
When obtained, gain [gold]Frozen Egg[/gold], [gold]Toxic Egg[/gold], and [gold]Molten Egg[/gold].
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_FORGE_PERSI: After combat, your current [gold]Forge[/gold] is not cleared and is restored at the start of the next combat.
Forged a hundred times, never melted down.
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_SHA.title: What If Only Kill
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_DOUBLE_MAP_: Doubles the map length of each act.
Long and winding is the road ahead.
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_ELITE_BEFOR: What If There's Always an Elite Before Rest
Every room directly before a [gold]Rest Site[/gold] becomes an [gold]Elite[/gold] room.
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_INFINITE_UP: What If I Could Upgrade Forever
All cards can be upgraded infinitely.
One more time, and one more time again.
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_SPIRE_TAX.t: What If Climbing the Spire Paid Taxes
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_SPIRE_TAX.d: Whenever you enter a room, pay tax: {MonsterTax} for Monster, {EliteTax} for Elite, {BossTax} for Boss, {TreasureTax} for Treasure, {ShopTax} for Shop, {EventTax} for Event, {AncientTax} for Ancient, and {RestSiteTax} for Rest Site. If you cannot afford it, you still enter and your gold can go negative.
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_SPIRE_TAX.f: Nothing says adventure like a room-entry fee.
When you would take fatal damage, survive instead and set your HP to 1. Triggers up to 9 times per run.
The curtain is not falling yet.
What If I Could Sell Cards
In shops, you can right-click cards in your deck to sell them for gold at 50% of their shop buy price.
Even dead draws can be liquidated.
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_INFINITE_PO: Whenever you procure a potion, fill your empty potion slots with random potions. After you use a potion, automatically refill it with a random potion.
Drink up. The shelf refills itself.
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_SOLO_UPGRAD: At the end of each combat, randomly upgrade a card in your deck.
One card always finds a way to improve.
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_GO_SECOND.d: At the start of each combat, after the player draws and before the first player turn begins, enemies immediately take one action.
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_GO_SECOND.f: This time, the initiative is theirs.
What If I Were the God of Gamblers
All replaced cards become random [gold]3-cost or higher[/gold] cards. When obtained, gain [gold]Snecko Eye[/gold].
One eye sees chaos. The other sees the jackpot.
At the start of each turn, instead of drawing in order, choose that many cards from your draw pile and put them into your hand.
The deck obeys whoever knows the marks.
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_JUMP.title: What If I Could Jump
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_JUMP.descri: Hold [gold]Space[/gold] to jump. If you jump [blue]30[/blue] times within [blue]3 seconds[/blue], you immediately skip the combat room.
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_JUMP.flavor: The ground is only a suggestion.
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_ONLY_FAKE_M: What If Shops Were Only Fake Merchant
All shop rooms are replaced with the Fake Merchant event.
Every bargain hides a grin with too many teeth.
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_ONLY_TREASU: What If There Were Only Treasure Rooms
All rooms on the map become Treasure rooms, except for Ancient and Boss rooms.
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_ONLY_ONE_PA: What If There Were Only One Path
When obtained, replace the map of every act with a single straight path.
WHAT_IF_RELICS_RELIC_WHAT_IF_WIDER_RANDO: What If the Map Grew Wider
Each act generates a brand-new wider random map with significantly more room nodes and route choices.
Do not follow the old road. Lay down a larger one.
